## Behavior change

Describe the user-visible routing, questioning, capability, approval, context, installation, or evaluation behavior changed by this pull request.

## Evidence

- [ ] Added or updated behavior cases when routing changed.
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_pack.py`.
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/run_evals.py --check`.
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`.
- [ ] Attached representative raw forward traces for non-trivial policy changes.
